cards.rules_text: Choose two creatures you control. If their total power is equal to their total toughness, discover creature X twice, where X is their total power, then sacrifice the chosen creatures. [i](To discover creature X, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland creature card with mana value X or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)[/i]

Morphosize. [i](Look at the top five cards of your library. Then you may sacrifice a creature to put a creature card with mana value X or less from among those cards onto the battlefield, where X is 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.)[/i]
